reviews.review_title: A fun game and a game with good potentia
reviews.review_description: This game I recently played looks good with good graphic, good mods, and good potential! So if you like a good game with good graphics and looks like it will be popular try this out! Plus if you have discord because it’s new you might have a chance to be a mod! So please play this and good game Vor! (the owner)

developer_response.body: Thank You! We really appreciate your love for Chimp!

reviews.review_description: This game has good graphics and I see a lot of potential in this game!

developer_response.body: Awesome! Glad you love the game!

reviews.review_description: this is legit just a terrible remake of dark terror
This is a good game and made by a good and awesome and talented owner 😊

reviews.review_title: Direct copy of the game dark terror
reviews.review_description: Goofy ahh copy of a great game dark terror, this game is also one of the worst games I’ve ever played, horrible quality, broken horror, literally almost no cosmetics and overall just a copy.
Chimp is so fun the graphics are sooooo good just wait till about 0.10 it will be amazing the owner is ssooooooo sigma

developer_response.body: Welcome Back, Thank You for putting so much love and care into our game. We worked hard on it!

reviews.review_description: The game was made by an awesome owner (I’m friends with him) and the graphics are really good!! Everyone sub to VORSHADOW now and download the game! (I’m mod)

Honestly probably gonna be one of the most popular fan games in a few months because it’s really good great graphics while having great performance Chimp! Is one of the best fan games I’ve ever played.
I really like the game and I really want to meat the owner so if you do read this I wanna meet up in game
